sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6105" key="a)mfitina/ssw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφιτῐνάσσω</orth>, <sense id="n6105.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shake around,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δικλίδας ἀμφετίναξε . . προσώποις</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">swung round</tr_> the door in my face, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.255</biblScope> </bibl> (Paul. Sil.).</sense> </entryFree>
